problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
